normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.27 - Unhosted Short-Term Rental Accommodation
scope_summary: Establishes the framework for assessing development applications for unhosted short-term rental accommodation (STRA) across the City of Fremantle scheme area, except dwellings registered under the Short-Term Rental Accommodation Act 2024 Part 3 and used for no more than 90 nights per 12-month period. Sets signage, car parking, occupancy, servicing, time-limited approval, management plan and code of conduct requirements, with relaxed parking rules in the City Centre Zone. Approvals are personal to the landowner and do not run with the land.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: registered unhosted STRA exempt from this policy
sign plaques/plates on main frontage of unhosted STRA
unhosted STRA in all zones except City Centre Zone (in addition to R-Codes parking)
single dwelling used as unhosted STRA
grouped and multiple dwellings used as unhosted STRA
development approval where Council deems appropriate to assess amenity impact
Property Manager response to nuisance behaviour complaints

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
City of Fremantle Local Planning Scheme No.4
